title: Python Mastery
subtitle: Major Libraries Training Course
description: A Complete 16-Week Program for Data Science, Machine Learning & Scientific Computing

weeks.title: Python Foundations & Standard Library
weeks.theme: Environment setup, syntax, core data structures, functions

weeks.title: NumPy: Arrays & Vectorized Computing
weeks.theme: Numerical arrays, vectorization, broadcasting, linear algebra, random

weeks.title: Pandas: DataFrames & Data Handling
weeks.theme: Series, DataFrame, loading data, cleaning, grouping, merging

weeks.title: Visualization: Matplotlib & Seaborn
weeks.theme: Line, bar, scatter, histogram, boxplot, subplots, styling, visual EDA

weeks.title: File Formats & Data Pipelines
weeks.theme: CSV, JSON, XML, Excel, text parsing, regex, cleaning pipelines

weeks.title: HTTP, APIs & Web Scraping
weeks.theme: requests library, REST APIs, JSON handling, BeautifulSoup, ethics

weeks.title: Web Frameworks: Flask & FastAPI
weeks.theme: Routing, templates, REST APIs, Pydantic, async basics, deployment concepts

weeks.title: Machine Learning with scikit-learn
weeks.theme: ML workflow, preprocessing, classification, regression, pipelines, evaluation

weeks.title: Scientific Python: SciPy & SymPy
weeks.theme: Optimization, integration, statistics, symbolic math, equation solving

weeks.title: Practical Statistics for Data Science
weeks.theme: Descriptive stats, distributions, correlation, hypothesis testing, confidence intervals

weeks.title: NLP: NLTK, spaCy & Transformers
weeks.theme: Tokenization, stemming, NER, POS tagging, text classification, Hugging Face

weeks.title: Computer Vision with OpenCV
weeks.theme: Image representation, transformations, filters, edge detection, contours

weeks.title: Databases & Data Engineering
weeks.theme: SQLite, SQLAlchemy ORM, ETL pipelines, Dask for large data

weeks.title: Automation, Scripting & Testing
weeks.theme: os/pathlib, subprocess, selenium, logging, pytest, automation scripts

weeks.title: Capstone Project: Design & Implementation
weeks.theme: Project planning, data acquisition, preprocessing, modeling/analysis, integration

weeks.title: Capstone Project: Polish, Package & Present
weeks.theme: Packaging, documentation, README, demo, retrospective, deployment concepts
